finding.analyst_note: A newly installed Windows service grants durable, SYSTEM-level execution and is a common persistence and lateral-movement mechanism. Benign software also installs services, so the image path and origin decide intent.
finding.description: hypothesis: EVTX EID 7045 records installation of service 'mnemosyne' (image C:\windows/Mnemosyne.sys) (record 41217); service installation is a durable persistence and lateral-movement mechanism — corroborate the binary and origin before response.
finding.hunt: Security 7045/4697 where ServiceName not in baseline and the ImagePath hash is not allow-listed
finding.next_pivot: Verify the service ImagePath and its hash, the installing account, and any preceding remote logon; check 7045/4697 and the binary on disk.
